dimensions.name: Mandate signal
dimensions.prompt: Is there public evidence of a senior product, operations, or transformation role being created, vacated, or unfilled? Include: CPO/COO/CTO departure or absence, founder running product without operator backing, board announcement of operational review, post-acquisition integration need.

dimensions.name: Transformation need
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence the company is undergoing a material business model, product, or operational transformation, not just growing? Triggers: SaaS migration, AI integration into core product, post-merger integration, shift from services to software, platform consolidation, major cost programme.

dimensions.name: Operating gap
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence the company lacks operating capability at CPO/COO level? Proxies: engineering-led leadership without product or operations layer, rapid scaling with no operator on team, Glassdoor execution themes, investor commentary on operational maturity.

dimensions.name: Stakeholder pressure
dimensions.prompt: Is there investor or board-level pressure creating urgency for the mandate? Triggers: PE ownership with active return-timeline, recent acquisition creating integration debt, public company with activist pressure, series C+ with down-round risk or churn signals.

dimensions.name: Hiring history
dimensions.prompt: Has the company previously hired senior operators externally at CPO/COO/VP level in the last 3 years, or shown a pattern of bringing in executives for transformation rather than promoting internally?

dimensions.name: Portfolio fit
dimensions.prompt: Does this firm's portfolio consist primarily of B2B SaaS, enterprise software, AI/ML, or tech-enabled services companies with 50–500 employees? Ignore consumer, hardware, early-stage, and non-tech portfolios.

dimensions.name: Operator orientation
dimensions.prompt: Does this firm show evidence of actively placing or sourcing operating executives for portfolio companies? Proxies: Operating Partner hires on team page, published talent or value-creation programme, OP title visible on LinkedIn.

dimensions.name: Active mandate signal
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence this firm currently has portfolio companies with open or likely senior operator mandates? Triggers: open CPO/COO/Operating Partner role at portfolio company, recent acquisition in portfolio creating integration need.

dimensions.name: Network — warm path
dimensions.prompt: Does Patrick have a direct or warm-intro relationship with anyone at this firm or a portfolio company? Score High for named contact or prior meeting, Medium for second-degree with strong mutual, Low for cold.
